title: The Elements Plugin
description: With this plugin, the four elements can be controlled: Water, earth, fire, and air
body:
### The Elements Plugin


When a player logs into the server for the first time (after the server has launched), they will be assigned one of four races: water, earth, fire, or air. Each of these races has unique abilities.

## Water Race:
Passive Ability: The player cannot drown.
Ability 1: Grants the player "Dolphin’s Grace II" and "Speed IV" effects for 25 seconds.
Ability 2: Applies the "Slowness XXI" effect to all nearby players for 10 seconds.

## Earth Race:
Passive Ability: The player takes no damage from suffocation or falling blocks such as anvils.
Ability 1: Grants the player the "Resistance II" effect for 25 seconds.
Ability 2: Creates a column of dirt beneath the player, raising them 5 blocks high.

## Fire Race:
Passive Ability: The player takes no damage from lava or fire.
Ability 1: Triggers a small explosion beneath the player that emits a wave of fire, dealing explosive damage in the area.
Ability 2: Releases a large wave of fire, applying the "Wither II" effect to all nearby players.

## Air Race:
Passive Ability: The player takes no fall damage.
Ability 1: Instantly launches the player high into the air with a strong boost.
Ability 2: Pushes all nearby players away and launches them upward.

Recipe for changing races:

(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90e05b5259f7e527e35a3e157a15f60c2623c4db.png)

OP Commands:

/changerace: Changes the player’s race.
/resetcooldown: Resets the ability cooldowns for all players.

Note: To create this plugin, the ChatGPT tool by the company OpenAI was used.
